summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Invoice Edit Approval System. Backend APIs working excellently (93.8% success rate), frontend components fully functional with proper RBAC, approval workflow, and real-time badge polling.

minor_issues.issue: Test failed because tried to approve already approved request, not actual RBAC issue
minor_issues.impact: No functional impact - test design issue

passed_tests: PUT /api/invoice-edit-requests/{id}/approve - Approve request with auto invoice update
Invoice auto-update after approval with correct values
Change history recording with approval details
ApprovalModule.jsx - Dashboard displays requests with filters
ApprovalModule.jsx - Request detail modal with before/after comparison
ManualInvoiceModule.jsx - Request Edit button visible and clickable
Sidebar.jsx - Invoice Edit Approval menu item present
End-to-end approval workflow: Request → Approve → Invoice Update → History
